name: Chocolate Mousse Icing with Amaretto
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the whipping cream to 180°F (82°C).
2. Carefully melt the chocolate chips in a microwave until smooth and fully incorporated into the cream, ensuring no chocolate specks remain.
3. Refrigerate the mixture for at least several hours, or overnight.
4. Cut the cake into halves or thirds and sprinkle with amaretto.
5. Frost the cake with the mousse frosting.
6. Garnish with grated chocolate.
